methods.description: A computational pipeline for processing raw RNA-seq data, quantifying gene expression, and identifying differentially expressed genes (DEGs) in Brassica napus under heat stress conditions.

steps.description: Quality checks for the raw fastq files were conducted using FastQC v0.11.8 (Andrews, 2010).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform quality control on raw sequencing data using FastQC

steps.description: Reference transcriptome file for Brassica napus was downloaded from Genoscope 1 .
Transcript expression was quantified using Kallisto v0.44.0 (Bray et al., 2016).
The transcript expression levels were converted to gene expression levels using tximport (Soneson et al., 2015) v1.6.0 (countsFromAbundance = "no").
steps.searchable_summary: Aggregate transcript counts to gene counts using tximport

steps.description: The low-count genes were prefiltered by keeping only those genes that have at least 5 counts in total.
The tximport data was loaded into DESeq2 with DESeqDataSetFromTximport thus creating offset and correcting for changes to the average transcript length across samples .
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare data for DESeq2 analysis using DESeqDataSetFromTximport

steps.description: Principal component analysis (PCA) was conducted to determine the relatedness of the biological replicates (Supplementary Figure S1A).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on gene expression data

steps.description: Pairwise contrasts were performed between control and heat-stressed samples to identify differentially expressed genes (DEGs) in response to heat stress.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform pairwise differential expression analysis using DESeq2

steps.description: To generate more accurate log 2 foldchange estimates lfcShrink (type = "apeglm") function was used.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply LFC shrinkage to differential expression results

steps.description: The thresholds for differential expression were set at fold change 1.5 and p-adjusted value cut off 0.01 (lfcthreshold = 0.585, altHypothesis = "greaterAbs, " alpha = 0.01, pAdjustMethod = "BH") for the alternate hypothesis, BH: Benjamini-Hochberg Zhu et al., 2019).
steps.searchable_summary: Filter differential expression results based on fold change and adjusted p-value thresholds
